User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the BarangayConnect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

contactNumber.description: The contact number of the user.

civilStatus.description: The civil status of the user (Single, Married, Divorced, Widowed, Separated, Live-in).

workStatus.description: The work status of the user (Employed, Unemployed, Self-Employed, Looking for a job).

youthAgeGroup.description: The youth age group of the user (16-17 yrs old, 18-24 yrs old, 25-30 yrs old).

youthClassification.description: The youth classification of the user (In school youth, Out of School youth, working Youth, youth with special needs).

youthClassificationDetails.description: Additional details for youth with special needs classification.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Represents a user role within the application (e.g., Admin, Member).

id.description: Unique identifier for the role entity.

name.description: The name of the role (e.g., Admin, Member).

description.description: A description of the role and its permissions.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a project within the barangay.

id.description: Unique identifier for the project entity.

startDate.description: The start date of the project.

endDate.description: The end date of the project.

status.description: The status of the project (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Completed).

imageUrls.description: Image URLs associated with the project.

reportUrls.description: URLs of reports associated with the project.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an event within the barangay.

id.description: Unique identifier for the event entity.

startDate.description: The start date and time of the event.

endDate.description: The end date and time of the event.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Represents user feedback for the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the feedback entity.

rating.description: The rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5).

comment.description: The comment provided by the user.

submissionDate.description: The date and time the feedback was submitted.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents an announcement within the barangay.

id.description: Unique identifier for the announcement entity.
Unique identifier for the settings entity.

gmailAccount.description: The Gmail account associated with the user.

twoFactorAuthentication.description: Indicates whether two-factor authentication is enabled.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Uses path-based ownership for private user data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: roleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the role.

definition.description: Collection indicating admin privileges. Existence of a document grants admin rights.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user with admin privileges.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the project.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier for the event.

definition.description: Stores user feedback. Uses path-based ownership to associate feedback with users.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user providing the feedback.

params.name: feedbackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the feedback.

params.name: announcementId
params.description: The unique identifier for the announcement.

definition.description: Stores user-specific settings. Uses path-based ownership to ensure only the user can access their settings.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user whose settings are being stored.

params.name: settingsId
params.description: The unique identifier for the settings document.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the BarangayConnect application's requirements for user management, project tracking, event scheduling, feedback collection, and announcement broadcasting, while adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, Access Modeling, and Data Clarity. It incorporates denormalization to avoid hierarchical authorization dependencies, ensuring that security rules can be simple and robust.

**Authorization Independence:**

*   Roles:  Instead of relying on custom claims or hierarchical `get()` calls, roles are stored in a dedicated collection `/roles/{roleId}`. User documents themselves do not contain the role, but the existence of a document in `/roles_admin/{userId}` confers admin rights.

**Structural Segregation:**

*   User Data: Private user data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, providing path-based ownership and simple security rules.

**Access Modeling:**

*   Path-Based Ownership: The `/users/{userId}` collection utilizes path-based ownership for user-specific data.
*   Global Roles: The `/roles_admin/{userId}` collection uses existence over content for determining admin privileges.

**QAPs Support:**

*   Secure List Operations: The structure enables secure `list` operations by segregating data based on ownership and access levels. For example, listing projects or events requires checking user roles or membership in relevant groups, without needing to filter based on document content.

The structure avoids mixing data with different access needs in the same collection, thus simplifying security rules. For instance, public announcements are stored separately from user-specific settings.

Denormalization ensures that authorization information is readily available within each document, eliminating the need for complex `get()` calls in security rules. This approach enhances the performance and security of the application.
